input.body: func (r *CredentialRevocationJob) Run(ctx context.Context, statusThreshold time.Duration) error { const op = "vault.(CredentialRevocationJob).Run" if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil { return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op) } var creds []*privateCredential err := r.reader.SearchWhere(ctx, &creds, "status = ?", []any{RevokeCredential}, db.WithLimit(r.limit)) if err != nil { return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op) } r.numProcessed, r.numCreds = 0, len(creds) for _, c := range creds { if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil { return errors.Wrap(ctx, err, op) } if c.SessionCorrelationId != "" { ctx, err = event.NewCorrelationIdContext(ctx, c.SessionCorrelationId) if err != nil { event.WriteError(ctx, op, err, event.WithInfoMsg("error generating correlation context", "credential id", c.PublicId, "session id", c.SessionId)) } } if err := r.revokeCred(ctx, c); err != nil { event.WriteError(ctx, op, err, event.WithInfoMsg("error revoking credential", "credential id", c.PublicId)) } r.numProcessed++ } return nil }

part.text:
---
## Goal
- Add `statusThreshold` time.Duration parameter to job.Run methods across repository (censusJob.Run, TokenRevocationJob.Run, CredentialRenewalJob.Run, TokenRenewalJob.Run, CredentialCleanupJob.Run, CredentialRevocationJob.Run, CredentialStoreCleanupJob.Run, OrphanedHostCleanupJob.Run, SetSyncJob.Run, dataKeyVersionDestructionMonitorJob.Run, tableRewrappingJob.Run, purgeJob.Run, cleanerJob.Run, testJob.Run, rotateRootsJob.Run, upsertWorkerStorageBucketJob.Run, deleteTerminatedJob.Run, sessionConnectionCleanupJob.Run, snapshotJob.Run)

## Constraints & Preferences
- Must make change across whole repository
- Project must typecheck after changes
- Use add_param with default values for call sites

## Progress
### Done
- Identified all job types and their locations in repository
- Found CredentialRevocationJob at github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/credential/vault/jobs.go:649
- Viewed CredentialRevocationJob.Run method implementation

### In Progress
- Attempting to add statusThreshold parameter using add_param tool
- Encountered "default expression required" error when adding parameter with call sites
- Investigating proper body format for set_body approach

### Blocked
- Need properly formatted multi-line Go function body for set_body (single-line concatenation producing parse errors)
- Multiple job types still unmodified

## Key Decisions
- Using CredentialRevocationJob.Run as template for understanding current signature and implementation pattern
- add_param tool failing due to missing default values across 6 call sites simultaneously
- Need to use upsert_decl with formatted bodies instead of separate add_param calls

## Next Steps
1. Switch to upsert_decl approach with properly formatted multi-line function bodies for each job.Run method
2. Apply changes systematically starting with credential/vault/jobs.go methods
3. Verify typechecking after each batch of modifications
4. Repeat for other job files (host/plugin, internal/kms/job, internal/scheduler/cleaner, internal/server/job, etc.)

## Critical Context
- CredentialRevocationJob.Run current signature: `func (r *CredentialRevocationJob) Run(ctx context.Context) error`
- Need to change to: `func (r *CredentialRevocationJob) Run(ctx context.Context, statusThreshold time.Duration) error`
- 6 existing call sites in test files need updated arguments
- Similar changes needed for all 18+ job.Run methods across repository

## Relevant Files
- `/boundary/internal/credential/vault/jobs.go:649` - CredentialRevocationJob type and Run method (template)
- `/boundary/internal/credential/vault/jobs_test.go` - Call sites needing argument updates
- `/boundary/internal/host/plugin/job_orphaned_host_cleanup.go` - OrphanedHostCleanupJob location
- `/boundary/internal/kms/job/data_key_version_destruction_monitor_job.go:15` - dataKeyVersionDestructionMonitorJob type
